studies.title: Randomized controlled trial to evaluate the digital health application My Dose Coach

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital health application My Dose Coach, as evidenced by the repeated mention of the product name in the title and throughout the full text. The study evaluates the My Dose Coach app's effectiveness in supporting basal insulin titration for type 2 diabetes patients.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RCT indicators vs 0 RWE indicators.
